company: The name of the company whose supplier risks are being evaluated
supplier_count: The number of suppliers the company relies on for lithium
pricing_model: Describes the pricing model of the lithium suppliers. For instance, variable-pricing clauses tied to global spot markets
risk_assessment: Detailed analysis of the identified risks
